# Vegetalia

> Vegetalia is a 100% pure vegetarian pizza kitchen in Banashankari, Bengaluru, serving whole wheat thin-crust pizza (no maida) with fresh in-house cheese made using vegetarian rennet. Operating since 2016, delivering and offering takeaway across South Bengaluru.

## About

Vegetalia is a pure veg kitchen — no meat, no eggs, no non-vegetarian ingredients of any kind, from base to toppings to cheese. Every pizza base is made from 100% whole wheat flour with no refined maida, giving a thin, crisp crust. The mozzarella cheese is made fresh in-house daily using vegetarian rennet (plant or microbial sourced, not animal rennet), making it suitable for vegetarians and Jains. Toppings are "triply loaded" — three times the vegetable toppings of a typical pizzeria. A dedicated No Onion No Garlic pizza is available, with both sauce and toppings free of onion and garlic, making it 100% Jain-friendly.

Pizzas are available in two sizes: Regular (8", 4 slices, serves 1) and Medium (11", 8 slices, serves 2). Vegetalia offers home delivery and takeaway only (no dine-in), open daily 11 AM – 11 PM, with average delivery time of 30 minutes. Rated 4.7/5 on Google.

Delivery areas: Banashankari, Girinagar, JP Nagar, Jayanagar, Vijayanagar, BTM Layout, Basavanagudi, RR Nagar, Kanakapura Road, Hosakerehalli, Uttarahalli, Chikkalasandra.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://vegetalia.in/): Overview, story, FAQs, reviews, and ordering links.
- [Menu](https://vegetalia.in/menu): Full pizza menu with descriptions and pricing (Regular and Medium sizes).
- [Order Online](https://orders.vegetalia.in/vegetaliapizza/order): Place a delivery or takeaway order.
